name: CEMTREX INC
summary: Overview Cemtrex, Inc. was incorporated in 1998 in the state of Delaware and has evolved through strategic acquisitions and internal growth into a leading multi-industry company. Unless the context requires otherwise, all references to we, our, us, Company, registrant, Cemtrex or management refer to Cemtrex, Inc. and its subsidiaries.
